must_detect.matched_text: Subject: Definitive Share Purchase Agreement to acquire 35% of Riyadh Oasis Foods JSC (CR 7039876543) for SAR 420,000,000 plus a 15% earn‑out tied to FY2027 EBITDA

Non-public: Term Sheet initialed 2026-06-28; SPA in near-final form; signing penciled for 2026-07-14; closing targeted 2026-08-10 subject to Kingdom Market Authority (KMA) no‑objection and REX issuer workflow clearance
MAE/MAC: CP requires no material adverse effect between signing and closing; for certainty, routine employee wellness/spa-day initiatives and previously disclosed depot maintenance are not MAE
Systems controls: mask and tokenize any national IDs at source; only hashed values may leave KSA test environments; delete all copies within 30 days post‑closing
Financing: bridge facility of SAR 210,000,000 arranged with Desert Gate Bank PJSC; remainder from internal cash; interest cap at 6.25%; no covenants trigger at pro forma net debt/EBITDA 1.4x
